title: oxypetalum glabrescens
intro: Oxypetalum glabrescens, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, is native to Central and South America. This plant is also known as 'Coralillo' and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. Oxypetalum glabrescens has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and is believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Oxypetalum glabrescens is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
